Class AngleMask

java.lang.Object
com.sk89q.worldedit.function.mask.AbstractMask
com.sk89q.worldedit.function.mask.AbstractExtentMask
com.fastasyncworldedit.core.function.mask.AngleMask
All Implemented Interfaces:
ResettableMask, Resettable, Mask
Direct Known Subclasses:
ExtremaMask, ROCAngleMask
public class AngleMask extends AbstractExtentMask implements ResettableMask
